display.purpose: Editing title field and largest markdown headings. The single biggest voice; no shouting hero scale.

title.purpose: Modal titles, quick-fill prompt name, in-content section headings.

body.purpose: Default reading size for descriptions, settings, prose. Keep columns 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Metadata, counts, timestamps, tag pills. Sentence case, never all-caps.

code.purpose: Editor body, asset names, fill previews, MCP fields, {{variables}}. The literal-string voice.

shadows.name: overlay-modal
shadows.purpose: Command palette, quick-fill, settings modals over a 30% scrim.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: The {{ }} autocomplete and small floating menus.

shadows.name: soft-panel
shadows.purpose: The preview card; the one resting surface allowed a whisper of lift.

shadows.name: ring-hover
shadows.purpose: Default interactive-affordance cue: an outline that warms on hover, not a shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions (hover, selection, open).

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Every animation must degrade to a crossfade/instant alternative.

breakpoints.name: rail
breakpoints.purpose: Fixed width of the prompt/asset list rail (w-80).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loud call-to-action on a view (copy result, connect, new).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c96442; color: #faf9f5; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b65535; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f4ed, 0 0 0 4px #3898ec; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: bordered, quiet, warms toward ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #5e5d59; border: 1px solid #e8e6dc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #d1cfc5; color: #141413; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: List filter / form field. Focus shifts the border to the lone cool focus-blue, no glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="在当前列表内筛选…" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #f5f4ed; color: #141413; border: 1px solid #e8e6dc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #87867f; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3898ec; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: A tag pill in warm sand; active filter variant inverts to a terracotta wash.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #e8e6dc; color: #5e5d59; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; } .ds-chip-active { background: rgba(201,100,66,0.15); color: #c96442; }

components.name: Variable Chip
components.description: A fillable {{variable}} slot, legible in prose and the editor overlay.
components.css: .ds-var-chip { background: rgba(201,100,66,0.16); color: #c96442; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.05em 0.4em; font-family: 'Anthropic Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9em; }

components.name: Prompt List Item
components.description: A row in the prompt rail. Transparent at rest, ivory on hover, terracotta wash when selected. Depth is border + tone, never a shadow.
components.html:
客户报告生成器
根据要点生成结构化周报
components.css: .ds-listitem { border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-listitem:hover { background: #faf9f5; } .ds-listitem-selected { background: rgba(201,100,66,0.08); border-color: rgba(201,100,66,0.3); } .ds-listitem-title { font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141413; } .ds-listitem-sub { margin-top: 2px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #87867f; }

components.name: Command Palette Item
components.description: A ranked result row in the Ctrl/Cmd+K palette; active row gets a terracotta wash and a return glyph.
components.html:
P
客户报告生成器周报 · 3 个变量
components.css: .ds-cmd-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-cmd-active { background: rgba(201,100,66,0.12); } .ds-cmd-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 6px; background: #e8e6dc; color: #5e5d59; font-family: 'Anthropic Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; } .ds-cmd-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-cmd-title { font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141413; } .ds-cmd-sub { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #87867f; } .ds-cmd-enter { color: #c96442; }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Transient bottom-center notification; error variant uses role=alert and crimson icon.
components.html: 已复制填充后的 Prompt
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #faf9f5; color: #141413; border: 1px solid #e8e6dc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Anthropic Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-toast-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c96442; }

narrative.overview: PromptBox is the lamp-lit desk where a writer keeps the words they reach for again and again. The surface is warm parchment, the ink is near-black, the one accent is a terracotta the color of a fountain pen's barrel. The prompt being written or filled is the only true protagonist, and every piece of chrome is furniture that holds still so the words can move. Type carries the hierarchy through a serif/sans/mono triad; depth is warm hairline borders and rings, with real shadows held back for things that genuinely float. The whole interface flips to a warm-dark charcoal through the same semantic tokens, so the personality survives the theme switch intact.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment canvas with a single terracotta accent used sparingly
Serif headlines (weight 500) against a sans body and a mono technical voice
Hairline-border and ring-based depth; shadows reserved for true overlays
Semantic tokens that flip the entire UI to warm-dark with no dark: variants
Keyboard-first surfaces where chrome recedes and content leads

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta is the only brand color and stays under ~10% of any screen. Secondary emphasis comes from weight, ink, or a sand fill, not more orange.

rules.name: The Warm-Mirror Rule
rules.body: Light and dark are the same design through one set of semantic tokens. Never write a dark: utility or a zinc/slate value; theme changes live only in the .dark token block.

rules.name: The Cool-Color Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Blue exists only as --color-focus on a focused input. No blue links, buttons, or info states.

rules.name: The Single-Serif-Weight Rule
rules.body: The serif speaks at weight 500 across every size. Hierarchy comes from size and the serif/sans contrast, not stacked serif weights.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Code Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for literal machine text: asset identifiers, prompt source, config fields, {{variable}} tokens. Never for human prose to look techy.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until something floats. A card in page flow gets a border and tone shift, not a drop shadow. Shadows mean above-the-page, nothing else.

rules.name: The Ring-Not-Glow Rule
rules.body: Hover and focus are crisp 1px rings and border shifts, never soft glows or blurred halos.

dos: Do keep terracotta (#c96442) under ~10% of any screen; let weight, ink, and Sand fills carry secondary emphasis.
Do change colors only through semantic tokens and the .dark block; use bg-canvas, text-ink, border-line, never a dark: utility or zinc/slate value.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; convey depth with line/line-strong borders and the Ring Warm hover outline. Reserve real shadows for modals, popovers, toasts.
Do use the serif at weight 500 for titles, the sans for prose, and mono only for literal machine text.
Do make every frequent action keyboard-reachable and label buttons verb + object.
Do verify the Olive Gray / Stone Gray text ramp hits >=4.5:1 on Parchment for body and metadata; bump toward Ink when close.
donts: Don't make it a playful consumer toy: no cartoon rounding, mascots, candy palette, or bouncy/elastic motion.
Don't make it heavy enterprise software: no conservative blue-gray chrome, modal-bureaucracy, or serious-means-gray-and-boxed.
Don't make it a generic SaaS dashboard: no cool-gray card grid with gradient accents, no hero-metric template.
Don't introduce a second accent or any blue beyond --color-focus on a focused input.
Don't use ALL CAPS sentence text or tracked uppercase eyebrows above sections.
Don't use colored left/right stripe borders, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't put a drop shadow on a surface that sits in the page flow.
